footer.tagline: Your security is your first concern, fortunately we've made it ours.

home.heroSubtitle: Cyber PolCo protects the digital infrastructure of businesses, institutions, and individuals across the Democratic Republic of Congo, Namibia, and beyond.
home.missionBody: To be a leader in cybersecurity, offering our clients unmatched protection and total peace of mind, so they can focus on their core business with full confidence.
home.visionBody: To be the trusted regional leader in cybersecurity and artificial intelligence, pioneering AI-powered solutions that protect digital ecosystems and enable organizations and communities across Africa to thrive through secure, innovative, and impactful digital transformation.
home.mapSubtitle: Hover or tap a country to learn more.
home.servicesSubtitle: Professional cybersecurity solutions and specialized consulting for businesses, institutions, and individuals.
home.articlesSubtitle: Our insights and advice for navigating the internet safely.
home.finalCtaBody: Let's talk about your cybersecurity, awareness, or compliance needs.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: Cyber PolCo offers professional cybersecurity services and specialized consulting for businesses, institutions, and individuals.

articles.title: Articles
articles.subtitle: Awareness, analysis, and practical cybersecurity advice.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Join a team building tomorrow's cybersecurity in Central and Southern Africa.
careers.noOpeningsBody: We aren't hiring at the moment. Check back here regularly for upcoming opportunities.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: A question, a project, an incident to report? Our team is listening.
contact.formSuccess: Thank you! Your message has been sent — we'll get back to you shortly.
contact.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
contact.errorEmailWorkOnly: Please use your work email address — personal Gmail, Outlook, and Yahoo addresses aren't accepted.
contact.errorMessageTooShort: Please add a bit more detail (at least 10 characters).
